sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ زِيَارَةُ الطَّبِيبِ لِلْفَحْصِ الدَّوْرِيِّ مَرَّةً فِي السَّنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je posjetiti ljekara radi redovnog pregleda jednom godišnje.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to visit the doctor for a regular check-up once a year.

sentences.arabic: يَفْحَصُ الطَّبِيبُ ضَغْطَ الدَّمِ وَنَبَضَاتِ الْقَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar provjerava krvni pritisak i otkucaje srca.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor checks the blood pressure and the heart rate.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ الرِّعَايَةُ الْوِقَائِيَّةُ فِي اكْتِشَافِ الْمَشَاكِلِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ مُبَكِّرًا.
sentences.translation: Preventivna njega pomaže u ranom otkrivanju zdravstvenih problema.
sentences.translationEn: Preventive care helps in discovering health problems early.
